# claudeadmin_compliance_project_attachments (Data Source)

Lists metadata for files attached to a project (`/v1/compliance/apps/projects/{id}/attachments`). Content download is out of scope for Terraform state — use the Compliance API directly for binaries. Enterprise + Compliance Access Key with scope `read:compliance_user_data`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "claudeadmin_compliance_project_attachments" "under_review" {
  project_id = "proj_01ABC..."
}

output "big_attachments" {
  value = [
    for a in data.claudeadmin_compliance_project_attachments.under_review.attachments :
    a if a.size_bytes > 10 * 1024 * 1024
  ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `project_id` (String)

### Read-Only

- `attachments` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--attachments))

<a id="nestedatt--attachments"></a>
### Nested Schema for `attachments`

Read-Only:

- `created_at` (String)
- `filename` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `mime_type` (String)
- `size_bytes` (Number)
